arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea scouts stunned by wonderkid's goal
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea scouts were in attendance as Max Moerstedt scored a stunning Europa League goal, according to a report. Arsenal and Chelsea scouts stunned by wonderkid's goal

arts.ttl: Latest Chelsea injury news for Brighton as Maresca confirms huge return after Reece James update
arts.sum: The France international was plagued by injuries in the 2023/24 season with his last league start coming against Manchester City on the opening day of the new campaign. Considering the squad at his disposal, in particular with regard to the attacking options, it should come as no surprise that Maresca is starting to get a tune out of his players with back-to-back away wins secured against Bournemouth and West Ham.

arts.ttl: Gusto return, Madueke dropped, Nkunku wait - Chelsea lineup Enzo Maresca should pick vs Brighton - Sam Truelove - football.london
arts.sum: Bobby's XI : Sanchez; Gusto, Fofana, Colwill, Cucurella; Caicedo, Fernandez; Madueke, Palmer, Sancho; Jackson. Malo Gusto made his return from injury in the 5-0 win over Barrow in the week, while Christopher Nkunku netted a hat-trick against the League Two side and is pushing for a start against Brighton.

arts.ttl: Opta predicts the result of Chelsea vs Brighton this weekend in the Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to welcome Brighton and Hove Albion to Stamford Bridge in the Premier League this weekend. The Blues have played some of their...

Chelsea mitigated a test they've often failed as of late away at West Ham United last weekend, with Maresca's side emerging as a supreme counter-attacking force. GK: Robert Sanchez - Sanchez looks to have found his feet in west London at the start of his second season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool want 'world class' ex-Chelsea star as Salah replacement
arts.sum: Liverpool want 'world class' ex-Chelsea star as Salah replacement After the Reds’ 3-0 win over Manchester United at the start of September, Salah told Sky Sports : “I had a good summer and had a long time to myself to try to stay positive because as you know it's my last year at the club.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca offers Ben Chilwell a lifeline after previously placing the defender in his 'bomb squad' and said it was 'better' for him to leave Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: The left-back was among a number of high-profile players who were excluded from first-team training by the Chelsea manager over the summer and looked set to leave the club.
